mapper.sql: id AS application_id, application_no, product_code, applicant_name, id_card_no, mobile, loan_amount, loan_term, employment_type, company_name, work_years, status, current_step, channel_code, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_application (application_no, product_code, applicant_name, id_card_no, mobile, loan_amount, loan_term, employment_type, company_name, work_years, status, current_step, channel_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationNo}, #{productCode}, #{applicantName}, #{idCardNo}, #{mobile}, #{loanAmount}, #{loanTerm}, #{employmentType}, #{companyName}, #{workYears}, #{status}, #{currentStep}, #{channelCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM loan_application ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
